title: Raising awareness of cold weather and its impact on health
body: "  CCHS navigation menu:  CCHS homepageTopic: weather-related hazards Hazard: cold    Key resources on cold weather risks:   Raising awareness of cold weather risks and its impact on health Cold weather risks and their impact on health: slide set Supporting vulnerable people during cold weather Adverse Weather and Health Plan: supporting evidence    Awareness raising slide set  The aim of the cold weather risks and their impact on health slide set is to:   raise awareness of the health impacts of cold weather provide a resource that can be used to engage with partners aid in planning and decision-making for the winter   It gives an overview of the evidence base and epidemiology of cold-associated deaths and links to additional resources.  The resource is aimed at:   national institutions, such as the UK Health Security Agency, NHS England, the Department of Health and Social Care, and the Office for Health Improvement and Disparities commissioners of health and social care, such as local authorities, integrated care boards, integrated care partnerships, directors of public health, local resilience forums and health and wellbeing boards providers of health, such as primary care, secondary care and social care providers community and voluntary sector   "
